title: Lovlina Borgohain: Sarupathar community supports Lovlina Borgohain for Paris Olympics | Guwahati News - Times of India
description: Sarupathar community rallies behind Assam boxer Lovlina Borgohain with the tagline 'Go For Gold Lovlina' for her Paris Olympics journey. Local support and pride evident in her victory celebrations.
keywords: Guwahati news, Guwahati latest news, Guwahati news live, Guwahati news today, Today news Guwahati,Paris Olympics,Lovlina Borgohain,Go For Gold,community support,Assam boxer
